summary:
OVERCOMING SPIRITUAL OFFENSE: Brandon reflects on the importance of examining his spiritual health and letting go of grudges, drawing inspiration from John Bevere's book "The Bait of Satan". Brandon shares his personal struggles with holding onto offenses from other ministers and childhood bullies, emphasizing that harboring resentment creates a spiritual blockage akin to a dam. Brandon stresses the necessity of forgiveness, dying to self, and building spiritual resilience to prepare for greater anointing and to avoid becoming a statistic of those whose love grows cold in the end times.

EXPOSING GLOBAL CORRUPTION: Brandon discusses an impending release of Epstein-related files by an anonymous hacker group identifying as "Legion". Brandon recounts a prophetic vision involving a massive ransom and the exposure of elite basketball players, Hollywood stars, and politicians. Brandon notes that this revelation will spark outrage among various ethnic groups and serve as a catalyst for unveiling deeply buried generational secrets of abuse, drawing parallels to a new Edward Snowden-type leak that will shake the Vatican.

CLEANSING OF THE MODERN CHURCH: Brandon prophesies that the year 2026 will be marked by immense political theater and a profound cleansing within the Christian church, referencing 1 Corinthians 5:5. Brandon foresees the exposure and sudden downfall of mega-ministers and corrupt church leaders due to hidden sins. According to Brandon, God is raising up unknown, refined individuals who will preach genuine holiness and repentance rather than relying on nepotism or exploiting the congregation for financial gain.

GEOPOLITICAL SHIFTS AND CONFLICTS: Brandon shares visions regarding significant international upheavals, including the removal of Claudia Scheinbaum in Mexico and the rise of a new conservative leader. Brandon foresees cartel retaliations, guerrilla warfare emerging from Cuba targeting troops in Venezuela, and the exposure of deep state manipulation. Furthermore, Brandon visualizes Marco Rubio's future political trajectory and sees the exposure of secret plots involving boxcars and the Santa Fe Railroad, likening the domestic vulnerability to another massive terrorist attack.

MIDDLE EASTERN DEVELOPMENTS: Brandon describes visions of the Middle East, specifically observing the groundwork and negotiations for a Third Temple involving MBS. Additionally, Brandon witnesses the construction of unusual steel structures in Gaza, signaling a rapid fulfillment of biblical end-time prophecies and an upcoming massive spiritual harvest and revival across the global landscape.

FINANCIAL AND TECHNOLOGICAL PROPHECIES: Brandon details a prophetic vision of a new digital crypto age, symbolized by a white rocket held hostage by major banking figures like Jamie Dimon of JP Morgan, Bank of America, and Wells Fargo. Brandon explains that these institutions seek to control this financial revolution using a copper cord, while Europe scrambles to create its own framework. Concurrently, Brandon warns of advanced AI integration and transparent spider drones used in covert warfare, cautioning that this technology will eventually introduce a demonic beast system disguised as societal cures.

COSMIC DISTURBANCES AND ALIEN DECEPTION: Brandon warns of incoming cosmic events, specifically identifying a massive asteroid named Apophis, likened to biblical Wormwood. Brandon also anticipates severe weather anomalies, widespread coastal fires, and massive earthquakes that will significantly damage Vatican City. Furthermore, Brandon cautions against upcoming widespread alien disclosures and UFO sightings, clarifying that these are not extraterrestrials but demonic entities and fallen angel technology designed to deceive the masses and explain away the rapture.
